root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as resign_date_tdate , Pka_Com_Function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) as membername, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.entry_id, pka_com_function.fp_get_user_name(sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.entry_id) as user_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate
FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_resign_share, sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_share.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) and (sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.cancel_status = '0') and (sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result = '1') /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = '007016' order by sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no

r_amnat_book_salary_deduction_nest.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no as membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as membername from sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_loan_card where (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no) and (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0') and (sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0) and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0}
